app_description_text.message: Easily unblock the content you want and websites you need with our Chrome proxy—an essential Chrome extension for 2025.

warningText.message: Proxy warning! Another browser extension is controlling your proxy settings, preventing CyberGhost from working. Please disable any conflicting extension.

incognitoWarningText.message:
Firefox now requires addons to run in Private Windows to update proxy settings.

Please visit the "about:addons" page, select the "CyberGhost" addon, and set "Run in Private Windows" to "Allow".
